_comment: LC300 hotspot 3D anchors, reconciled with scripts/blender/INVENTORY.md (SHA 929f32e). Coordinate system: +X=Right, -X=Left, +Y=Front, +Z=Up. Bonnet reference: (0, 5.33, 1.59). Anchored entries reference a real mesh by name + local offset; DEFERRED entries have no mesh and use world_position directly (no offset applied).

DEFERRED._note: Front center grille area; merged into Main body / Other parts. Estimated forward of Bonnet (Y=5.33+0.87) and below it.
Driver side mirror; merged. Estimated outboard of FL_Door (X=-1.27) at door-top height.
Passenger side mirror; mirrored across X from ext-mirror-l.
Windshield center; merged into Main body. Estimated rear of Bonnet (Y=5.33-0.43) and above its top.
Engine block center; Engine mesh is one combined object. Estimated under Bonnet center.
Air filter; +0.5m X (passenger side) of block.
Fuse box; -0.4m X, +0.4m Y from block.
Front-left suspension; Suspension is one combined mesh. Estimated below FL_Wheel hub (Z lowered).
Front-right suspension; mirror of und-susp-fl across X.
Exhaust system; not a discrete mesh. Estimated along rear underbody, slightly +X (exhaust typically on passenger side).
Fuel tank; not a discrete mesh. Estimated mid-rear underbody, between rear axle (Y=2.20) and cabin.
Transfer case; between front and rear axles, slightly aft of midpoint.
Front differential; centered between FL/FR wheels (X=0) at front axle Y=5.97.
Rear differential; centered between RL/RR wheels (X=0) at rear axle Y=2.20.
